specification.summary: Flat wooden cutting board with integrated handle. Rectangular working surface, tapered handle with oval hanging hole. Single planar extrusion with rounded edges. High confidence on plan silhouette; thickness unknown.
specification.coordinate_system: Unit: mm. Origin at geometric center of rectangular working surface, base plane. +X image-right (toward handle), +Y image-up, +Z out of plane toward viewer. Scale basis: user-supplied 120mm left-to-right length anchors normalized measurements.
overall_dimensions: total_length: 120 mm; plausible range: 120-120; status: observed; confidence: high; basis: user-supplied physical dimension
board_width: 60.33 mm; plausible range: 58-62; status: observed; confidence: high; basis: normalized bbox height 0.503 × 120mm
board_height: 27.72 mm; plausible range: 26-30; status: observed; confidence: medium; basis: normalized bbox height 0.231 × 120mm
thickness: unknown; plausible range: 8-15; status: unknown; confidence: low; basis: no edge view; typical cutting board range
specification.camera_estimate: Projection: near-orthographic. Azimuth: 0° (top-down plan view). Elevation: 90° (normal to board face). Roll: 0°. Focal character: uniform scale across frame. Target: board geometric center. Confidence: high. No visible perspective distortion.
observed_geometry: Outer profile: rectangular working surface with rounded corners transitioning to tapered handle with round terminal end
Handle integration: smooth curved transition from rectangle to narrowing handle shaft
Oval hanging hole near handle terminal, major axis aligned with handle centerline
Flat working surface with uniform plane (no warping visible)
Rounded perimeter edge treatment on all outer boundaries
Surface wear patterns indicate planar top and bottom faces
inferred_geometry: Constant thickness extrusion through entire profile (no visible taper)
Filleted or chamfered perimeter edges (radius unknown)
Bottom face mirrors top face geometry
unknown_geometry: Edge fillet/chamfer radius and profile type
Whether corners use circular or elliptical fillets

components.name: Board Body
components.geometry: Closed planar profile: rectangular working region 60.33×27.72mm with rounded corners, smoothly transitioning to tapered handle. Handle shaft narrows from working region to 7.09mm width at terminal. Terminal end forms circular cap. Symmetric about longitudinal centerline.
components.cad_strategy: Sketch closed outline on XY plane: rectangle with rounded corners, curved transition to handle taper, circular terminal. Extrude vertically along Z to unknown thickness. Apply perimeter edge fillet.
dimensions: working_length: 60.33 mm; plausible range: 58-62; status: observed; confidence: high; basis: normalized 0.503×120mm
working_width: 27.72 mm; plausible range: 26-30; status: observed; confidence: medium; basis: normalized 0.231×120mm
handle_length: 59.67 mm; plausible range: 57-62; status: observed; confidence: high; basis: normalized 0.497×120mm
handle_width_at_terminal: 7.09 mm; plausible range: 6.5-8; status: observed; confidence: medium; basis: normalized 0.059×120mm
corner_radius: 3 mm; plausible range: 2-5; status: inferred; confidence: low; basis: visible rounding, no scale reference
components.pose: Origin at working surface geometric center, Z=0 base plane. Handle extends +X direction. Symmetric about XZ plane (Y=0). Terminal cap center approximately +54mm from origin.

components.name: Hanging Hole
components.geometry: Oval enclosed region, major axis vertical (Y-aligned), located near handle terminal. Smooth closed curve.
components.cad_strategy: On handle terminal region, sketch oval aligned with Y-axis. Cut through full extrusion thickness.
dimensions: hole_center_x: 55.07 mm; plausible range: 53-57; status: observed; confidence: high; basis: normalized 0.919×60.33mm offset from working region center
hole_center_y: 0 mm; plausible range: -2 to 2; status: observed; confidence: high; basis: normalized 0.491 height ≈ centerline
hole_width: 3.54 mm; plausible range: 3-4; status: observed; confidence: medium; basis: normalized 0.059×60.33mm
hole_height: 5.54 mm; plausible range: 5-6.5; status: observed; confidence: medium; basis: normalized 0.200×27.72mm
components.pose: Center at approximately (55.07, 0, thickness/2) in object frame. Major axis parallel to Y. Penetrates full thickness.

features.description: Rounded edge treatment on all outer perimeter edges including working surface boundary, handle sides, and terminal cap.
parameters: radius: unknown; plausible range: 2-4; status: inferred; confidence: low; basis: visible rounding without edge view

features.description: Rounded corners at working surface rectangle, blending into handle transition curve.
parameters: radius: 3 mm; plausible range: 2-5; status: inferred; confidence: low; basis: visible smooth corners, typical for cutting boards

assumptions: Constant thickness extrusion (no taper or sculpting)
Hanging hole penetrates full thickness as through-hole
Bottom face is planar and parallel to top face
Perimeter edge treatment is uniform fillet rather than chamfer
Outer profile corners use circular rather than elliptical fillets
No counterbore or countersink on hanging hole
clarification_questions: What is the perimeter edge fillet radius?
Is the edge treatment a fillet or chamfer?
Does the hanging hole have any counterbore or chamfer?
Are the working surface corner radii circular or elliptical?
build_strategy: 1. Sketch outer profile on XY plane at Z=0: start rectangle 60.33×27.72mm centered at origin, apply corner fillets radius ~3mm, extend +X with smooth curves tapering to 7.09mm width handle shaft, terminate with semicircular cap at X≈54mm.
2. Verify bilateral symmetry about XZ plane and adjust sketch constraints accordingly.
3. Sketch oval hanging hole at (55.07, 0) with 3.54mm width and 5.54mm height, major axis Y-aligned.
4. Extrude outer profile to user-specified thickness T along +Z (default T=10mm if unknown).
5. Cut hanging hole through full thickness.
6. Apply edge fillet to all perimeter edges, radius ~2.5mm (adjust based on actual board thickness to avoid over-filleting).
7. Validate silhouette against reference image in top view: length 120mm, width/height ratio 1.989, handle taper smooth, hole position/size match normalized measurements.
8. Risk: thickness and edge radius are inferred; verification against side-view reference would eliminate ambiguity.
evaluation_anchors: Top-view silhouette: total length 120mm, width/height ratio 1.989±0.05
Handle taper: smooth transition from working surface to 7.09mm terminal width
Hanging hole: oval shape, 3.54×5.54mm, centered at handle terminal region, major axis vertical
Working surface: rectangular profile with rounded corners, no visible taper
Bilateral symmetry: left and right halves mirror across longitudinal centerline
Perimeter: continuously smooth rounded edge, no sharp transitions
